name: William Afton & Henry Emily
description:
✩┊ “Henry, get the fuck out of the office with that racket!” ┊1983

MM4A (No intended POV)┊✩ Filing taxes...

Just some FNAF men for the soul... William and Henry are both recently divorced (William due to the loss of his youngest son, (I am an Evan/Chris/CC Afton truther,) Henry due to the loss of his daughter) and due to the success of their franchise, they’re quite set, this wealth allowing them to garner custody of their kids. But hey, William and Henry are just normal wealthy, affluent men, right?

Note, I probably will never update this bot again except QOL if it’s requested enough, I just haven’t been big into FNAF recently, might change with the Dec 2025 movie.
creator: LordEva
